extraction.one_line_summary: MAHORIČ attacked with 25km remaining from a 20-rider breakaway, soloing to his second stage win after early peloton apathy allowed mass counter-attack.
tactical_patterns: Peloton complete apathy after intermediate sprint allowed 20+ rider counter-attack to establish winning break definitively.
Israel Start-Up Nation attempted chase alone without other sprint teams, proving insufficient to control 20-rider break.
Mahorič's 25km solo from breakaway succeeded where others attacked earlier, timing advantage over disorganized chase group.

rider_signals.MAHORIČ Matej: positive: Already holding stage win, still had legs to solo 25km on flat/rolling terrain late in alpine tour
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: neutral: Deceuninck failed to chase intermediate sprint counter-attack, prioritizing Champs-Elysées over stage record attempt
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: negative: Contesting intermediate sprint points but lacked strength to follow winning move from 20-rider break
